decisions.title_en: Apple WWDC 2026: redesigned standalone Siri, iOS 27, third-party model support
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Apple's WWDC 2026 keynote (June 8, 10am PT) unveils a fully redesigned Siri as a standalone chatbot app, iOS 27/macOS 27, and first-ever option to route Siri to third-party models (Gemini, Claude, ChatGPT). Day's biggest consumer-AI story.

decisions.title_en: SpaceX IPO roadshow launches early, fixed $135/share = $1.77T valuation
decisions.reason: Previously published 2026-05-29 with an $1.8T valuation floor and a planned 6-8 roadshow start. New info: roadshow actually launched June 4 (ahead of schedule after faster SEC review); SpaceX set a FIXED $135/share price (556.6M shares), bypassing the usual range process, for a $1.77T valuation and ~$75B raise; pricing June 11, Nasdaq debut June 12. Concrete, substantively new terms.

decisions.title_en: Bezos-backed Flourish raises $500M to build brain-inspired 20-50W AI
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Flourish exited stealth (announced June 6, round closed ~June 4) with $500M at $2.5B valuation, backed by Jeff Bezos, Lux Capital, GV, Catalio; building Cortex AI via connectomics to find the brain's 'core algorithm' and run AI at 20-50W vs today's massive draw.

decisions.title_en: BYD confirms humanoid robot program, may sell via dealer network
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. BYD EVP Stella Li confirmed BYD is developing humanoid robots (codename 'Yao-Shun-Yu', started 2022, under its 15th Business Unit), could sell them through its auto dealer network, and is building a Xi'an park targeting 50,000 robots/year.

decisions.title_en: Altman-backed Helion raises $465M Series G to power AI/Microsoft with fusion
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Helion (Sam Altman-backed) raised $465M Series G led by Thrive Capital at $15.5B post-money to scale toward delivering fusion power to the grid as early as 2028, including a plant for Microsoft; directly tied to AI-driven power demand.
Pre-keynote 'what to expect' roundups are superseded by the actual keynote coverage kept above; folded into the single apple-wwdc-2026-siri item.
